meaning: [复]n.[用作单]生物能学(研究活生物体中的能量转换)
examples: This is the web page of Journal of Bioenergetics and Biomembranes.
Bioenergetics is defined as the study of energy transformation in living organisms.
The body's healing potential is at its peak and bioenergetics weak points are harmonized and the body's own energy flow activated.
